steps.title: Apply the 27% increase to the 2014 figure
steps.content:
A 27% increase means the 2024 projection is 127% of the 2014 jobs:
$$122{,}000 \times 1.27 = 154{,}940$$

steps.title: Match to the closest choice
steps.content:
Among the four choices, 154,900 differs from 154,940 by only 40, far less than any other option.
That matches Choice D — 154,900.
